items.title: Kim Jong Un was meant to be their only idol - then North Koreans discovered K-pop
items.dek: Defectors tell the BBC that despite restrictions, K-pop has cut through in the stifling dictatorship.
items.body: Defectors tell the BBC that despite restrictions, K-pop has cut through in the stifling dictatorship.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: A Florida Judge Called a Litigant an 'Entitled Little Snot,' Blessed Her Father for Not Beating Her, and — His Lawyer Assures the Commission — Remains Fit for the Bench
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: White House defends Argentina team over Falklands banner
items.dek: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.
items.body: The comments could further fuel the row over the incident, which has seen Downing Street back calls for Fifa to investigate.
